responsibilities: • guide companies in ifrs transition and implementatio n  • interpret complex ifrs standards and provide advisory notes   • convert financial statements from local gaap to ifrs   • support audits, disclosures, and regulatory filings   • train internal finance teams on ifrs updates   • assist in ifrs impact assessments and policy  documentation
